subparts.text: Explain the concept of "Niskama Karma" as per Indian values. 1
Discuss the significance of respect for others in creating a harmonious society. 1
What are the types of values? 2
Explain the impact of values on behavior in an organizational setting. 2
What is the environmental aspect of CSR? 3
How does CSR benefit the community and consumers? 3
Discuss the role of corporate governance in preventing unethical business practices. 4
What is the purpose of a corporate governance code? 4

questions.question_text: Explain the importance of spirituality and ethical living in achieving harmony in life. Provide examples from Indian philosophical traditions. 1
Describe the values of caring and sharing. How do these values contribute to peaceful living and strong relationships? 1
Discuss the significance of ethics in the management process, with examples of ethical issues faced by organizations. 2
Explain the ethos of Vedanta in management and its application in the modern business world. 2
Discuss the models of CSR and their benefits for businesses and society. Include examples of Indian companies practicing CSR. 3
Discuss the challenges businesses face in implementing CSR initiatives in India. How can these challenges be overcome? 3
Discuss important provisions of Company Law related to corporate governance. 4
Discuss the impact of corporate governance on stakeholder trust and business performance. 4
